title: Snad Alehouse
description: Adds a snad that forces Sugar Cane, Cactus, and Bamboo to grow instantly.
body:
# Snad

This mod introduces **Snad**, a specialized block that significantly accelerates the growth of crops planted upon it. It is designed as a modern, high-performance alternative to traditional growth-accelerating mods.

## Features

*   **Supported Crops:** Works natively with Sugar Cane, Cactus and Bamboo.
*   **Mod Compatibility:** automatically detects and accelerates any modded plant that uses standard `age` properties.
*   **Performance:** Optimized logic eliminates particle spam and unnecessary block updates.
*   **Configurable:** Includes a settings menu (via Mod Menu) to adjust the instant growth chance percentage (1% to 100%).

![shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31dd13c02011f3ca9eae633d9ac0ac2124caf8f5.jpeg)

## Crafting

Combine two Sand blocks in a crafting grid (shapeless) to create Snad.
![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2d5efb37887453761645ec13a53ac4daf3f025b.png)

## Configuration

![Snad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aa74ce334b34f2f1e9e440eb0987e1bc0b7dba0_0.webp)
